UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user profile in the EvenTide application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

role.description: User's role within the application (Owner, Planner, Guest, Security, Cohost).

Show.title: Show
Show.description: Represents a public, ticketed show created within the EvenTide application by a Ticketier.

showId.description: Unique identifier for the Show entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to UserProfile representing the show owner (Ticketier).

eventDate.description: Date and time of the show.

imageUrls.description: An array of URLs for show images.

isPublic.description: Indicates whether the show is public or private. Should be true for shows.

isTicketed.description: Indicates if the show requires tickets for entry. Should be true for shows.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a private event created within the EvenTide application by a Host.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a single task or to-do item associated with an event.

eventId.description: The event this task belongs to.

title.description: The title or name of the task.

description.description: A detailed description of the task.

status.description: The current status of the task.

SeatingTable.title: SeatingTable
SeatingTable.description: Represents a single table in a seating chart for an event.

eventId.description: The event this table belongs to.

tableName.description: The name or number of the table (e.g., 'Table 1', 'High Table').

capacity.description: The number of seats at the table.

Seat.title: Seat
Seat.description: Represents a single seat at a table, which may or may not be assigned to a guest.

tableId.description: The table this seat belongs to.

seatNumber.description: The number of the seat at the table.

guestId.description: The ID of the guest assigned to this seat. Null if unassigned.

Gift.title: Gift
Gift.description: Represents a single item in an event's gift registry.

SongRequest.title: SongRequest
SongRequest.description: Represents a single song request made by a guest for an event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the song request.

eventId.description: The event this request belongs to.

requesterId.description: The ID of the guest who made the request.

requesterName.description: The name of the guest who made the request.

songTitle.description: The title of the requested song.

artist.description: The artist of the requested song.

status.description: The moderation status of the request.

FashionContract.title: FashionContract
FashionContract.description: Represents a formal commission proposal from an Event Owner to a Fashion Designer.

description.description: Detailed description of the designs needed.

budget.description: The proposed budget for the commission in Naira.

terms.description: Optional additional terms, like fitting schedules.

TicketTier.title: TicketTier
TicketTier.description: Defines a pricing and quantity tier for tickets of a specific show.

Ticket.title: Ticket
Ticket.description: Represents a single ticket purchased by a user for a show.

Guest.title: Guest
Guest.description: Represents a guest invited to an event.

id.description: The document ID, typically auto-generated by Firestore.

guestId.description: A unique identifier for the guest within the event.

eventId.description: Reference to the Event the guest is invited to.

userProfileId.description: Optional reference to a registered UserProfile.

guestCode.description: Unique alphanumeric code for guest check-in.

category.description: Category of the guest (e.g., Chairman, VIP, General).

hasCheckedIn.description: Indicates whether the guest has checked in to the event.

EventPlanner.title: EventPlanner
EventPlanner.description: Represents the relationship between an event and a planner.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EventPlanner entity.

eventId.description: Reference to the Event being planned. (Relationship: Event 1:N EventPlanner)

plannerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the planner. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N EventPlanner)

EventCohost.title: EventCohost
EventCohost.description: Represents a co-host assisting with an event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EventCohost entity.

eventId.description: Reference to the Event. (Relationship: Event 1:N EventCohost)

cohostId.description: Reference to the UserProfile of the cohost. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N EventCohost)

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents a chat message within the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

eventId.description: Reference to the Event the message belongs to. (Relationship: Event 1:N ChatMessage)

senderId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who sent the message. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N ChatMessage)

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the message was sent.

Media.title: Media
Media.description: Represents a media file (photo or video) associated with an event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Media entity.

eventId.description: Reference to the Event the media belongs to. (Relationship: Event 1:N Media)

uploaderId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who uploaded the media. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Media)

uploadTimestamp.description: Timestamp of when the media was uploaded.

PricePlan.title: PricePlan
PricePlan.description: Represents a pricing plan for events.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PricePlan entity.

name.description: Name of the price plan (Free, Standard, Gold, Platinum).

guestLimit.description: Maximum number of guests allowed in the plan.

securityPersonnelLimit.description: Maximum number of security personnel allowed in the plan.

plannerLimit.description: Maximum number of planners allowed in the plan.

cohostLimit.description: Maximum number of cohosts allowed in the plan.

price.description: Cost of the price plan in Naira.

EventPricing.title: EventPricing
EventPricing.description: Represents the price plan assigned to a specific event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the EventPricing entity.

eventId.description: Reference to the Event. (Relationship: Event 1:1 EventPricing)

pricePlanId.description: Reference to the PricePlan. (Relationship: PricePlan 1:1 EventPricing)

SecurityCode.title: SecurityCode
SecurityCode.description: Stores the security codes assigned for the security role in an event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SecurityCode entity.

eventId.description: Reference to the Event this security code is for. (Relationship: Event 1:N SecurityCode)

securityId.description: Reference to the UserProfile representing the security personnel. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N SecurityCode)

securityCode.description: The unique security code for the personnel.

Announcement.title: Announcement
Announcement.description: Represents announcements or notifications relating to an event.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Announcement entity.

eventId.description: Reference to the Event the announcement belongs to. (Relationship: Event 1:N Announcement)

authorId.description: Reference to the UserProfile who made the announcement. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Announcement)

timestamp.description: Timestamp of when the announcement was created.

PlannerProfile.title: PlannerProfile
PlannerProfile.description: Represents a public profile for an event planner.

id.description: The user's UID, linking to their UserProfile.

Ticketier.title: Ticketier
Ticketier.description: Represents a Ticketier or Promoter's public profile.

promoterName.description: The public name of the promoter or brand.

bio.description: A short biography for the promoter's public page.

avatarUrl.description: URL for the promoter's avatar or logo.

name.description: The public name of the vendor or brand.

specialty.description: The vendor's area of expertise (e.g., Photographer, Caterer).

MagazineIssue.title: MagazineIssue
MagazineIssue.description: Represents a single issue of the EvenTide Community Magazine.

status.description: The publication status of the magazine issue.

Notification.title: Notification
Notification.description: Represents a single notification for a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who receives the notification.

message.description: The content of the notification message.

link.description: A URL path to navigate to when the notification is clicked.

read.description: Flag indicating if the notification has been read.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the notification was created.

definition.description: Stores user profile information. Path-based ownership ensures only the user can access their own profile.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user. Corresponds to the Firebase Auth UID.

definition.description: Stores notifications for a specific user. Only the user can read or write to their own notifications.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

params.name: notificationId
params.description: The unique identifier of the notification.

definition.description: Stores public profiles for Ticketiers/Promoters.

params.description: The unique identifier of the ticketier, corresponding to their UID.

definition.description: Stores public profiles for vendors, categorized by specialty.

params.name: vendorId
params.description: The unique identifier of the vendor, corresponding to their UID.

params.name: tierId

params.description: The unique identifier of the event.

params.description: The unique identifier of the event.

params.name: taskId

definition.description: Stores the tables for an event's seating chart.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique identifier of the event.

definition.description: Stores the seats for a specific table.

params.name: eventId

params.name: tableId

params.name: seatId
params.description: The unique identifier for the seat.

definition.description: Stores gift registry items for a specific event.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique identifier of the event.

params.name: giftId
params.description: The unique identifier of the gift.

definition.description: Stores song requests made by guests for a specific event.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique identifier of the event.

definition.description: Stores commission contracts between owners and fashion designers for an event.

params.description: The unique identifier of the event.

definition.description: Stores guest information related to an event.

params.name: eventId
params.description: The unique identifier of the event.

params.name: guestId
params.description: The unique identifier of the guest.

definition.description: Stores event planner assignments for an event. Acts as a membership map indicating who is an event planner.

definition.description: Stores media files (photos/videos) associated with an event.

definition.description: Stores the details of available pricing plans.

params.description: The unique identifier of the price plan.

definition.description: Stores the pricing plan assigned to an event.

definition.description: Stores security codes for security personnel assigned to an event.

definition.description: Stores issues of the EvenTide Community Magazine. Drafts are only accessible by admins, while published issues are public.

params.name: issueId
params.description: The unique identifier for the magazine issue.

firestore.reasoning: The Firestore data structure is designed to ensure security, scalability, and ease of debugging. Public, ticketed shows created by Ticketiers are stored in a top-level `/shows` collection, separating them from private events created by Hosts, which are stored in the `/events` collection. This structural segregation improves query performance and simplifies security rules. User data is kept in a separate `/users` collection, and public Ticketier profiles are in `/ticketiers`, both secured by path-based ownership. Subcollections for shows (like `ticketTiers` and `tickets`) and events (like `guests` and `planners`) are nested under their parent documents, ensuring data locality and enabling targeted queries and security. A dedicated `notifications` subcollection under each user provides a private, real-time channel for alerts.
